card_description: Paul McCartney is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 2 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick explores the theological purpose of the "spurious long time" (the 2000-year gap since the 1st Advent)."

linked_segments.title: 1976-09-15_Dorothy_71.txt

linked_segments.summary: Dick argues that the Book of Acts is not a historical text but a "code" for our current reality. He views 3-74 as the moment he "woke up" from a fake memory-veneer into the real landscape of 70 AD Rom
